{{Infobox group
| name = Ghost-Blade
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ghost-Blade]] is a warband of the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ghost-Blades]] practice a [[Path]] of [[sword]] and death [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ghost-Blade]] is one of the eight wandering mercenary armies in the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Ghost-Blade]]'s [[Goldsign]] is a hovering spirit of death [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
